summary: Worldbuilding phase completed. 5 specialists produced geography.json (13 locations), culture.json (5 cultures), history.json (5 eras to YK 742), magic-system.json (10 rules, 7 forbidden uses), politics.json (7 factions). Auditor passed on iteration 2 after fixing one name inconsistency. 0 critical, 0 major findings remaining.
